verdict.rationale: The finance pack (v1 and v2) reports Q2 2026 qualified pipeline at EUR 13.510M, matching the claim, but the Q2 2026 quarterly update — a same-period document explicitly reporting the end-of-Q2 snapshot — states EUR 13.26M for the same metric. No supersession or restatement note in either document resolves the conflict, so authority rank alone cannot support the claim.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the EUR 13.51M (finance pack) vs EUR 13.26M (Q2 2026 quarterly update) figures for the same qualified pipeline metric and period; confirm which is the authoritative Q2 2026 closing value before relying on the claim.

evidence.span_text: Vantage Industrial Group SE closed Q2 2026 with revenue of EUR 21.89 million and 43 new enterprise account wins. The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter.

final_text:
Confirmed: two vault sources explicitly cover Q2 2026 "qualified pipeline" with different values — finance pack (v1 & v2) at 13.510M and the Q2 2026 quarterly update at 13.26M. The regional doc's "Qualified commercial pipeline" (13.053M) uses a local CRM and is a commercial subset (different scope, not a competing same-metric value). No explicit supersession/restatement language exists to resolve the 13.51 vs 13.26 conflict, so authority rank alone cannot make this "supported."
